UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the emergence of Amaterasu, the radiant Japanese sun goddess, symbolizing renewal, hope, and enlightenment.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the nudity or physical attributes of the card character.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Star card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ethereal, uplifting, hopeful, major, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Star card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the clash between finery and rags, symbolizing a disconnect between desires and reality.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the greedy wife's imperiousness, as it may overshadow the card's message of broken hopes and potential for redemption.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Star card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, minor, introspective, contemplative, instrumental
